question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists three main sections of the thesis but does not provide titles for them.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, but it could be more detailed. For example, specifying what traditional and modern methods will be discussed in the first section would be beneficial.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be understood from this text, but adding titles to each section would make it clearer. Additionally, mentioning how these sections connect or build upon each other could enhance understanding.
